person.name: John Earl of Ulster de Courcy

nameForms.fullText: John Earl of Ulster de Courcy

sibling.name: John Earl of Ulster de Courcy

km.France: ប្រទេសបារាំង

zh.lifeSummary: John Earl of Ulster de Courcy是Mrs Gorr Thorrasson的兒子，於1134年出生在愛爾蘭。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1210年在法國享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Earl of Ulster de Courcy是Mrs Gorr Thorrasson的儿子，于1134年出生在爱尔兰。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1210年在法国享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Courcy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphonse, Andree, Jacques, Michel, Monique.
French: habitational name from any of the places in Calvados, Loiret, Manche, and Marne called Courcy.
History: Nicolas Lemière dit Courcy from Courcy in Manche, France, married Louise-Geneviève Dubé in Rivière-Ouelle, QC, in 1749.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Earl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: North American: from the title originally adopted as a nickname parallel to Duke , King , etc. The title was used in England in Norman times as an equivalent of the French comte ‘count’ it is from Old English eorl ‘warrior, nobleman, prince’. In some cases the given name may have been taken from the surname Earl, which was originally either a nickname or a term denoting someone who worked in the household of an earl.

variants.name: Earle
meanings: North American: from the title originally adopted as a nickname parallel to Duke , King , etc. The title was used in England in Norman times as an equivalent of the French comte ‘count’ it is from Old English eorl ‘warrior, nobleman, prince’. In some cases the given name may have been taken from the surname Earl, which was originally either a nickname or a term denoting someone who worked in the household of an earl.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Ulster
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Reinhardt.
German: habitational name from any of several places so named (Saxony-Anhalt, Saxony). This is also the name of a river in Saxony, which in some cases may have given rise to the surname.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.description: Arrival of Normans at Baginbun in Co. Wexford thus started 800 year struggle between English and Irish.

en.lifeSummary: John Earl of Ulster de Courcy was born in 1134, in Ireland as the son of Mrs Gorr Thorrasson. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1210, in France, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: John Earl of Ulster de Courcy est né en 1134, à Irlande, fils de Mrs Gorr Thorrasson. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1210, à France, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: John Earl of Ulster de Courcy wurde 1134 in Irland, als Sohn von Mrs Gorr Thorrasson geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1210 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: John Earl of Ulster de Courcy è nato il nel 1134 nel Irlanda come figlio di Mrs Gorr Thorrasson. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1210, nel Francia, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Earl of Ulster de Courcyは1134年にアイルランドでMrs Gorr Thorrassonの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1210年にフランスで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Earl of Ulster de Courcy(은)는 1134년 아일랜드에서 Mrs Gorr Thorrasson의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1210년 프랑스에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Earl of Ulster de Courcy nasceu em 1134, em Irlanda filho de Mrs Gorr Thorrasson. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1210, em França, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: John Earl of Ulster de Courcy родился в 1134 г. в местности Ирландия. Его мать звали Mrs Gorr Thorrasson. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1210 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: John Earl of Ulster de Courcy nació en 1134, en Irlanda como hijo de Mrs Gorr Thorrasson. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1210, en Francia, a la edad de 76 años.

th.–Female: ถึงแก่กรรม
